planSummary: Re-run after fixing the 3 Branches bugs (search debounce, set-primary atomic swap, form card titles).
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP re-verification on localhost:5103 after code fixes on 2026-04-17.

cases.text: Type 6 chars 'الرياض'. Expect 1 request after debounce. Observed: 1 request with full term — debounce implemented in use-branches hook.

Click 'تعيين كفرع رئيسي' on 'فرع الروضة' while 'الفرع الرئيسي' is main. Expect atomic swap, no 409. Observed: swap succeeded, 'فرع الروضة' gained 'رئيسي' badge, previous main lost it, StatsGrid main count remained 1.

cases.summary: Create/Edit form card headings render section titles
cases.text: Navigate to /branches/create. Expect h2 titles 'الأسماء', 'الإعدادات', 'معلومات الاتصال' with matching descriptions. Observed: all three titles render correctly with distinct descriptions.
